examples:
!domain domain=moogle.com using-brand="Palo Alto Minemeld"
War Room Output
8. Get URL indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified URL, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the URL indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
url
Input
name: url

outputs.description: The Indicator DBotScore.Type The Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The DBot score vendor DBotScore.Score The DBot score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the vendor that defined the URL as malicious URL.Malicious.Description For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor defined the URL as malicious
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: URL data (value) URL.MineMeld.Indicators Entire indicator object
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: Indicator value URL.MineMeld.Indicators.miner Miner of the indicator
outputs.name: URL.MineMeld.Indicators.indicator

outputs.description: Entire indicator object MineMeld.Indicators.indicator Indicator value
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators

outputs.description: Miner of the Indicator MineMeld.Indicators.type Indicator type
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.miner

outputs.description: Indicator comment MineMeld.Miner Entire miner object
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.comment
